content.rendered: Jim Carlisle is the Head of the Technology & Business Solutions vertical, the Automation Fund, and is part of THL’s Management Committee. He leads the firm’s technology practice and manages a broad portfolio while fostering a strong team culture. Jim is a current Director for AMI and for several of THL’s technology investments including AutoStore, Brooks Automation, Fortna, and Auction.com.
